resources.string: Delete this audio file? This action cannot be undone.
Scan complete. %1$d songs found\nAdded %2$d, removed %3$d, metadata updated %4$d
Lyrics detected, please choose a source:
Tap the button below to create lyrics
Please select a lyrics source first
Supplement: fill empty lyrics only | Overwrite: replace all lyrics
Supplement: fill empty fields only | Overwrite: replace all fields
Enter file name, for example: [Song Title] - [Artist]
Current playing song is not in the library list
Double tap to return to top
Artist info could not be read
External lyrics save complete: %1$d success, %2$d failed
Lyrics already exist, skipped in supplement mode
Embedded lyrics could not be read
Default follows system, or switch app language manually
Waiting for current song to end
Playback controller is not ready. Try again later.
Delete this audio file? This action cannot be undone.
To use the app normally,\nplease grant the required permissions below.
Used to read and edit lyrics data in audio files
Used to access audio files in storage
Used to scan and read audio files on your device
Used to show media notifications and support background playback controls
Your privacy matters to us.\nThese permissions are only used for core app features.
No recommended results match your criteria
Input format: Song + Artist / Song / Artist
Example: City of Stars Ryan Gosling
Request failed. Check your network connection.
Lift Latin words as a whole
Played lyric hiding only works during auto-scroll; manual browsing restores default display.
Double tap to return to top
Choose and remove cached songs, fonts, and other files
Cover cache is kept automatically. Only manually cleanable cache files are shown.
Default Playback Bar Position in Landscape/Tablet
Automatically scans new files when entering the library
Configure which custom metadata fields are shown
Close the editor automatically after successful save, without success dialog
When these keywords are matched, featuring artists will be parsed from title
May be inaccurate for non-standard lyrics
There are unsaved changes. Discard them?
Lyrics are empty. This action cannot be performed.
Current lyrics are plain text, so timing tools are unavailable.
Failed to parse lyrics. This action cannot be performed.
Accompaniment copied to: %1 Delete the original file?
There are unsaved changes on this page. Continuing will discard them. Continue?
Enter milliseconds to shift. Positive delays, negative advances.
Please enter a valid millisecond value
Current song file does not exist
Unable to create or write accompaniment file
Unable to create accompaniment folder. Please grant access to Music directory.
Accompaniment directory permission expired. Please authorize again.
Cannot access Music directory. Please authorize again.
Cannot access .sing directory. Please authorize again.
Failed to create accompaniment file in authorized directory
No directory access permission. Please authorize again.
User confirmation is required to delete accompaniment file
No permission to delete accompaniment file
Deleting this source type is not supported
User confirmation is required to delete original file
No permission to delete original file
Please grant access to the /Music/ directory. After authorization, tap "Add Accompaniment" again.
"All files access" permission is required to save files. Tap "Grant Permission".
Authorization failed: /Music/ directory permission not granted.
Authorization failed: please select the /Music/ directory.
Authorization failed: unable to persist /Music/ directory permission.
Authorization successful. Please tap "Add Accompaniment" again.
Lyrics detected. Please choose a source:
Enter translations, one line per lyric line
Input format: Lyrics: Transliteration Note: Enter transliteration for one character per line. Example: 你: ni 好: hao
Parsing failed. Please check the format.
You changed the move-line selection. Discard changes?
Tip: Use line breaks to split lyrics into multiple lines. Each line becomes a new lyric line.
No line break detected. Cannot split.
At least two valid lyric lines are required after splitting.
You changed the lyrics content. Discard changes?
One lyric line per row Format per row: lyrics=translation (translation optional)
Split lyric units by spaces. To keep original spaces in lyrics, use double spaces.
Each row is treated as one lyric unit. You can quickly split with "One-click Word Split" in the menu (Recommended).
There is content in the input box. Are you sure you want to cancel?
Tip: parse <time> tags. v1 is left lyrics, v2 is right lyrics.
Enter TTML lyrics Paste TTML formatted lyrics
Tip: line breaks and extra spaces are removed automatically on import.
Already up to date. Latest version: %1$s
Search this group ID in QQ to join
QQ is not installed. Please install it first.
Thanks to these projects for supporting this app:
Audio metadata reading and writing library
Lyrics sync player, used as a technical reference
Android lyrics downloader, used as a feature reference
Accurate lyrics download and matching tool, used as a feature reference
Audio metadata search plugin, used as a feature reference
Import via enhanced LRC/ELRC word lyrics
No translation lines in current lyrics. Cannot recognize.
Save TTML lyrics to the same folder
Apply start time to previous unit end time
Apply end time to next unit start time
Current data is not saved. Switch anyway?
Tip: the first space is a separator; consecutive extra spaces are kept in the next unit.
Please import an audio file first
Go back now? Unsaved lyrics edits may be lost.
Changes are not saved. Switch anyway?
Empty lyric lines were found. Tap confirm to delete all empty lines.
One lyric line per row. Add translation after (=).
After import, you can use \"One-click word split\" in the menu.
Format the timeline? Lyrics will be sorted by timestamp and translations with the same timestamp will be merged automatically.
Audio path is empty. Cannot embed lyrics.
Lyrics were embedded into the audio file.
Original folder write failed. Saved to: %1$s
Failed to save lyrics file. Check storage permission and try again.
Select lines to split into words:
Select lines whose lyric units should be merged:
Select lines to convert to Simplified Chinese:

This feature detects romaji transliteration in translations (Japanese/Korean supported) and converts it to TTML-compliant per-character transliteration. Japanese small kana and gemination are handled. Save as TTML to preserve per-character transliteration.
Select which translation row contains romaji transliteration (applies to all lyric lines):
Only one translation row was detected. Row 1 will be used by default.
Possible reasons:\n• The file format does not support lyric writing\n• The file is in use by another app
Storage permission is required to scan audio files.
Set directories used to read audio files.
On first launch, load Android media library; later launches update incrementally.
When disabled, directory scanning is used. New/modified files require refresh.
Choose how the audio list is sorted.
Filter audio files shorter than 60 seconds
Songs from these directories will not be shown in the library.
Enabled by default. Reads system media library with auto incremental sync.
Select or enter an audio directory path:
Select or enter a directory path to exclude:
